case: EN-asset-is-English with title still JP (text fields English; title field JP)

terminology.ジェンマ/Gemma: Gemma (kept proper noun, romanized in dialogue)
terminology.ルディア/Ludia: Ludia (kept as ルディア speaker label)

addressing.<user> (Commander) to Gemma (ジェンマ): anh/anh ơi -> em, tớ -> cậu (boy = cậu nhóc; old lady = bà lão); Commander self = tôi/anh

rules_applied:
JP primary via ja.json; EN asset is structural authority (delimiter, BOM, CRLF,
count, record order).
Title translated to Vietnamese Title Case: 傷つき、色あせ、輝いて -> Tổn Thương, Phai Màu, Rực Sáng.
Speaker labels (field 1) kept byte-identical JP/placeholder; in-dialogue name mentions romanized (Gemma, Perdion, Felicione).
All internal fullwidth commas (， U+FF0C) converted to U+201A (‚) within VI text fields; ASCII delimiter commas preserved.

Every message field's
count mirrored exactly from EN asset (EN-authoritative); suffix '
' auto-mirrored for message lines, title gets full VI.
Ellipsis-only lines '...' -> '…' (U+2026) to differ from source bytes.
BOM + CRLF preserved; line count 1248 = EN.
intentional_keeps: Proper nouns Gemma, Perdion, Felicione left in Latin (project VI convention; romanized in dialogue).
Speaker labels ジェンマ / <user> / フェリシオーネ / ルディア kept verbatim JP.
SFX 'Fufu, ho ho ho, fwa fwa fwa' kept as light onomatopoeia (matches JP ふふ、ほっほっほっ、ふぁっふぁっふぁっ).
h18_note: Scene contains no explicit H-18 content; emotional/affectionate dialogue only (I love you / hug earring). All characters confirmed 18+ per project rule.
